title: Bridge Essay: Drug Addiction: Updating Actions to Habits to Compulsions Ten Years On.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mechanicality** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mechanicality — habit as automated behavior, loss of conscious control, automaticity.

**Drug Addiction: Updating Actions to Habits to Compulsions Ten Years On.**. Annu Rev Psychol.. PMID: 26253543. DOI: 10.1146/annurev-psych-122414-033457. Adecade ago, we hypothesized that drug addiction can be viewed as atransition from voluntary, recreational drug use to compulsive drug-seeking habits, neurally underpinned by atransition from prefrontal cortical to striatal control over drug seeking and taking as well as aprogression from the ventral to the dorsal striatum.
